---
title: "PhD Data Analysis"
---

This site contains automated analysis for PhD research on water insecurity in Freetown, Sierra Leone.

- [Daily Report](rmd/PhD_Dailys.html)
- [Household Analysis](rmd/HH_Analysis.html)
- [Water Source Analysis](rmd/Water_Source_Analysis.html)

*Last rendered: `r format(Sys.time(), "%B %d, %Y at %I:%M %p %Z")`*
